title: Noland Enters the Legend
description: The Golden City and its bell become a promise between Noland and Calgara, giving the present-day battle its emotional weight.
scene: Across pages 6, 7, 8, 9, this scene focuses on Calgara, Nico Robin, Musse, Shandia villager, Shandia warrior. The Golden City and its bell become a promise between Noland and Calgara, giving the present-day battle its emotional weight.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: These are the surviving ruins of...

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: This is the least we could do...

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: We've been guarding this very stone!

dialogue.speaker: Shandia warrior
dialogue.text: The only thing we're certain of,

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: We reverse our ancestors like gods.

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: And we will not run nor hide!

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: I heard the sound of this bell...!

summary: The Golden City and its bell become a promise between Noland and Calgara, giving the present-day battle its emotional weight.
